info.title: Resource Management API
info.description:
## Enterprise Timesheet & Resource Management System

A complete REST API for managing employee timesheets, project allocations, approvals, and resource utilization.

### Authentication
All protected endpoints require a **Bearer JWT token** in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

Obtain a token via `POST /auth/login`. Access tokens expire in **15 minutes**. Use `POST /auth/refresh` to get a new one.

### Roles & Permissions
| Role | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `RESOURCE_MANAGER` | Full org access — creates projects, manages users, uploads holidays |
| `PROJECT_MANAGER` | Team access — manages allocations, approves timesheets |
| `EMPLOYEE` | Self access — submits timesheets, raises work requests |

### Validation Rules
1. Entries cannot be more than **14 days in the past** or **7 days in the future**
2. **Weekend** entries require an approved exception request
3. **Holiday** entries require an approved exception request
4. Maximum **12 hours per day** across all projects
5. Cannot exceed **allocated hours** without an approved exception request

reason.example: Hours logged on holiday without approval

example.message: You do not have permission to perform this action

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management (Resource Manager only for writes)

tags.name: Timesheets
tags.description: Weekly timesheet submission and approval workflow

tags.name: Work Requests
tags.description: Exception requests for restricted timesheet entries

get.description:
Returns allocations scoped by role:
- **Employee**: only their own allocations
- **PM / RM**: all allocations (filterable)

post.description: Assigns a number of hours to an employee for a project. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**

409.description: Allocation already exists for this employee/project combination

patch.description: Increase or reduce the allocated hours. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**

delete.description: Removes the allocation. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token (15 min) and refresh token (7 days).
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

get.description: Returns the decoded JWT payload for the current user.

Returns the current employee's utilization metrics for this month:
- Allocated vs submitted hours
- Utilization percentage
- Pending approvals and work requests
- Weekly hours trend (last 8 weeks)
- Project breakdown

**Employee only.**

Returns team-level metrics for the PM's projects:
- Team utilization percentage
- Pending timesheet approvals
- Pending work requests
- Per-project analytics (allocated vs used hours)

**Project Manager only.**

Returns organisation-wide metrics:
- Overall utilization percentage
- Active projects and total employees
- Compliance breaches (employees with no timesheet this month)
- Skill utilization breakdown

**Resource Manager only.**

Returns exception requests scoped by role:
- **Employee**: only their own requests
- **Project Manager**: requests from their team members
- **Resource Manager**: all requests

post.description:
Employee raises a request to log hours outside normal rules.

**Request types:**
- `WEEKEND` — work on Saturday or Sunday
- `HOLIDAY` — work on a company holiday
- `BACKDATE` — log hours more than 14 days in the past
- `ALLOCATION_BREACH` — exceed allocated project hours

Once approved by a PM, the employee can submit the restricted timesheet entry.
**Employee only.**
Approves the request, allowing the employee to log the restricted hours. **Project Manager or Resource Manager.**

400.description: Request is not in PENDING state

post.description: Rejects the request. **Project Manager or Resource Manager.**

400.description: Request is not in PENDING state

get.description: Returns all holidays. Optionally filter by year. Used by the timesheet validation engine.

post.description:
Creates multiple holidays at once. If a holiday already exists on a given date, it is updated (upsert).
Used to upload the annual company holiday calendar.
**Resource Manager only.**

delete.description: Removes a holiday from the calendar. **Resource Manager only.**

get.description:
Returns projects scoped by role:
- **Resource Manager**: all projects
- **Project Manager**: only their managed projects
- **Employee**: only projects they are a member of

post.description: Creates a new project and assigns a Project Manager. **Resource Manager only.**

get.description: Returns project details including members and allocations.

patch.description: Update name, description, or assigned PM. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**
Sets project status to ARCHIVED. **Resource Manager only.**

post.summary: Add a member to a project
post.description: Adds an employee to the project team. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**

delete.summary: Remove a member from a project
delete.description: Removes an employee from the project team. **Resource Manager or Project Manager.**

get.description:
Generates and downloads an Excel (.xlsx) file containing all submitted/approved
timesheet entries for the specified employee within the date range.

**Resource Manager or Project Manager only.**

400.description: Missing from or to query params

get.description:
Generates and downloads an Excel file with all hours logged against the specified project
within the date range, grouped by employee.

**Resource Manager or Project Manager only.**

400.description: Missing from or to query params

get.description:
Generates an Excel file with utilization data for all active employees:
- Allocated hours
- Submitted/approved hours
- Utilization percentage
- Status (On Track / Moderate / Low)

**Resource Manager only.**

400.description: Missing from or to query params

get.description: Returns all skills in the catalog with employee count.

post.description: Adds a new skill to the catalog. **Resource Manager only.**

patch.description: Update skill name or description. **Resource Manager only.**

delete.description: Removes skill from catalog and all user assignments. **Resource Manager only.**

get.description:
Returns timesheets scoped by role:
- **Employee**: only their own timesheets
- **Project Manager**: timesheets from their project members
- **Resource Manager**: all timesheets

post.summary: Create or get timesheet for a week
post.description:
Creates a new DRAFT timesheet for the given week start date.
If a timesheet already exists for that week, returns the existing one (idempotent).
**Employee only.**

get.description: Returns full timesheet with all entries. Employees can only access their own.

patch.description:
Replaces all entries for the timesheet. Only allowed when status is **DRAFT** or **REJECTED**.
**Employee only.**

400.description: Cannot edit a submitted or approved timesheet

post.description:
Runs all 5 validation rules before submitting:
1. Date range (max 14 days past, 7 days future)
2. Weekend restriction
3. Holiday restriction
4. Max 12h/day
5. Allocation limit

**Employee only.**
Copies all entries from the previous week's timesheet into this one. **Employee only.**
Approves the timesheet. Only works on SUBMITTED timesheets. **Project Manager or Resource Manager.**

400.description: Timesheet is not in SUBMITTED state

post.description: Rejects the timesheet with a reason. Employee can then edit and resubmit. **Project Manager or Resource Manager.**

400.description: Timesheet is not in SUBMITTED state

get.description: Returns paginated list of users. **Resource Manager only.**

post.description: Creates a new user account. **Resource Manager only.**

patch.description: Update name, role, active status, or password. **Resource Manager only.**

delete.description: Sets isActive to false. Historical data is preserved. **Resource Manager only.**

post.description: Replaces all existing skill assignments. **Resource Manager only.**

get.description: Returns server status and database connectivity. No authentication required.
